name: Embedding Daemon (SigLIP-2)
description: GPU-resident SigLIP-2 image embedding service. Loads the model once and serves /embed over HTTP so every worker/backend shares one model instead of spawning its own subprocess. /health detects model warm-up and wedges.

settings.description: HTTP port the embedding daemon listens on
Public base URL consumers reach the daemon at (empty = auto-derived from port and exported to every service as PIXSIM_EMBEDDING_BASE_URL)
